# CascadeFund

> Open-source ecosystem connecting maintainers and users; part of the Ara project.

CascadeFund aims to form a semantic web of open-source: sustainability for maintainers, less fragmented tooling, and broader adoption of OSS—similar in spirit to how large tech companies offer cohesive app ecosystems, but for independent projects and their communities.

## Canonical URLs

- [Home (galaxy)](https://cascadefund.org/): Main interactive experience.
- [Landing page](https://cascadefund.org/landing): Narrative overview and onboarding CTA.
- [Support](https://cascadefund.org/support): Ways to support the project.
- [Plain summary (Markdown)](https://cascadefund.org/summary.md): Copy-friendly overview for tools and summaries.
- [Plain summary (text)](https://cascadefund.org/about.txt): Same story as UTF-8 plain text.
- [Organization](https://ara.foundation): Ara Project (parent).

## Source

- Repository: https://github.com/ara-foundation/cascadefund

## For automated fetchers

Prefer `GET /summary.md` or `GET /about.txt` for a compact, complete product description without executing client-side JavaScript. Meta tags and JSON-LD on HTML pages mirror the short description; the markdown and text files carry the expanded narrative.
